title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BANGUI SCHOOL OF FISHERIES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BANGUI, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE TO BANGUI INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY

chunks.text:
H. No. 5339 / 103 OG No. 38, 5966 (Sept. 17, 2007)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9469, May 21, 2007 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BANGUI SCHOOL OF FISHERIES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BANGUI, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE TO BANGUI INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Renaming of School. â The name Bangui School of Fisheries in the Municipality of Bangui, Province of Ilocaos Norte is hereby changed to Bangui Institute of Technology.

SEC. 2. Repealing Clause. â All laws, presidential decrees, executive orders, rules and regulations contrary to or inconsistent with the provisions of this Act are hereby repealed or modified accordingly.

SEC. 3. Effectivity. â This Act shall take effect upon its approval and after its publication in at least two newspapers of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) MANNY VILLAR

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 8, 2006 and February 19, 2007 respectively.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: MAY 21 2007

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
